name: gesso
description: Daily art-history guessing game — no-build static-data SPA.

scripts.test: node tests/scoring.test.mjs && node tests/medium.test.mjs && node tests/static-module.test.mjs && node tests/dom-harness.mjs && node scripts/check-pool.mjs && node scripts/check-design.mjs
scripts.check:syntax: node --check tests/scoring.test.mjs && for f in scripts/*.mjs api/*.js; do node --check "$f" || exit 1; done
